Syed Munir Ullah and Hunzala Zafar reacted to a post: I shipped an AI product in 24 hours. ⚡



Yesterday: Had an idea

Today: shadowboard.AI is live



What Shadow Board AI does:

Analyzes your browser history and shows what you're 𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗨𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗬 manifesting based on real behavior.



No self-reported goals. No vision boards.

Just cold, hard data.



I tested it on myself first.

The AI said:

"You're collecting motivation like Pokémon cards instead of executing."



That hurt. But it was true.



The build:

→ Spec-driven development methodology

→ Built with Claude.ai as my coding partner

→ Shipped on Vercel (free tier)

→ Total cost: $0

→ Total time: ~8 hours



What I learned:

1️⃣ Ship before it’s perfect

2️⃣ Your own pain = best product ideas

3️⃣ AI coding partners are incredible

4️⃣ Building in public creates accountability

5️⃣ Free infrastructure is powerful enough



THE OFFER:

-First 100 people get 𝗙𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿 status:

-Lifetime 70% discount ($9 vs $29/month)

-Unlimited shadow board analyses

-Weekly trend tracking

-Exclusive action plan generator



After 100? Regular pricing forever.



Join the waitlist:

https://lnkd.in/dm7D4_Ds



What's YOUR browser history actually manifesting? 👀

(Probably not what you think.)





P.S. Big thanks to Sir Zia Khan, Sir Muhammad Qasim, Sir Ameen Alam and Sir Hamzah Syed for teaching us spec-driven development. This methodology turned a 24-hour idea into a shipped product.



#BuildInPublic #AI #ProductDevelopment #Startup

Laiba Khan posted: Alhamdulillah 💞 

Today I passed the Digital FTE (Agent Factory Fundamentals) exam with a score of 74.44%.

Ramzan is going on, class timing was 2–5 PM, and Sir conducted the lecture and the test together so it wasn’t easy while fasting. But I’m truly grateful that I showed up, gave my best, and passed.

The score may not be perfect, but progress matters more than perfection. Every step is helping me grow in my Agentic AI journey.

Grateful for the opportunity to learn and improve every day. 🚀✨

#Alhamdulillah #AgenticAI #DigitalFTE #LearningJourney #Growth

Akbar Ali posted: 🚀 From Concept to Deployment: Building Impactful EdTech Solutions! 💡



Excited to share that I developed a full-fledged, enterprise-level Learning Management System for University of Sindh—transforming a simple idea into a platform that truly empowers students, teachers, and administrators.



Key Features:

✨ Secure multi-role authentication for Admins, Teachers & Students

✨ Dynamic, role-based dashboards with actionable insights

✨ Streamlined course & assignment management

✨ Real-time notifications & messaging for seamless communication

✨ Modern, responsive UI with Dark Mode for the best user experience



Every line of code was written with purpose—to solve real educational challenges and make learning better. This journey reminds me: ideas are just the beginning. Execution is what creates impact. 💎



💻 Check it out live: LMS Demo



Tech Stack: React • TypeScript • Tailwind CSS • Node.js • Express • MySQL



#FullStackDeveloper #EdTech #ReactJS #WebDevelopment #AkbarAli #InnovationInEducation
